heading: Supervision of construction: compliance with State law
label: 18237 Supervision of construction: compliance with State law
notes: Historical and Revision Notes1956ActRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)223750:885., .Sept. 11, 1950, ch. 945, § 664 Stat. 831The words “of facilities” are omitted as surplusage. The words “Chief of Engineers” are substituted for the words “Chief, Corps of Engineers” to conform to . The words “of the Army” and “of the Navy” are inserted for clarity.section 3036(a)(1) of this title

children.label: a
children.text: Any construction, expansion, rehabilitation, or conversion under may be performed under the supervision of the Chief of Engineers of the Army or the head of such office or agency in the Department of the Navy as the Secretary of the Navy may designate.section 18233(a)(1) of this title

children.label: b
children.text: The construction, expansion, rehabilitation, or conversion of facilities in a State under paragraph (2), (3), (4), (5), or (6) of shall be done according to the laws of that jurisdiction and under the supervision of its officials, subject to the inspection and approval of the Secretary of Defense.section 18233(a) of this title
